developed and audited for Morpho Vaults V1 (V1.0 and V1.1) (also known as MetaMorpho). Integration with other vaults must be carefully assessed from a security standpoint.This adapter must be used with Morpho Vaults V1 that are protected against inflation attacks with an initial deposit. See https://docs.openzeppelin.com/contracts/5.x/erc4626#inflation-attack.Must not be used with a Morpho Vault V1 which has a market with an Irm that can re-enter the parent vault or the adapter.Morpho Vaults V1.1 do not realize bad debt, so Morpho Vaults V2 supplying in them will not realize the corresponding bad debt.Losses that correspond to rounding errors are realizable.Shares of the Morpho Vault V1 cannot be skimmed (unlike any other token).If expectedSupplyAssets reverts for a market of the morphoVaultV1, realAssets will revert and the vault will not be able to accrueInterest.Shouldn't be used alongside another adapter that re-uses the id (abi.encode(\"this\", address(this)).","kind":"dev","methods":{"allocate(bytes,uint256,bytes4,address)":{"details":"Does not log anything because the ids (logged in the parent vault) are enough.Returns the ids of the allocation and the change in allocation."},"deallocate(bytes,uint256,bytes4,address)":{"details":"Does not log anything because the ids (logged in the parent vault) are enough.Returns the ids of the deallocation and the change in allocation."},"ids()":{"details":"Returns adapter's ids."},"realAssets()":{"details":"Returns the current value of the investments of the adapter (in underlying asset)."},"skim(address)":{"details":"Skims the adapter's balance of `token` and sends it to `skimRecipient`.This is useful to handle rewards that the adapter has earned."}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"test/external/morpho/adapters/MorphoVaultV1Adapter.sol":"MorphoVaultV1Adapter"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":100000},"remappings":[":@layerzerolabs/lz-evm-messagelib-v2/=lib/LayerZero-v2/packages/layerzero-v2/evm/messagelib/",":@layerzerolabs/lz-evm-protocol-v2/=lib/LayerZero-v2/packages/layerzero-v2/evm/protocol/",":@layerzerolabs/oapp-evm/=lib/devtools/packages/oapp-evm/",":@layerzerolabs/oft-evm/=lib/devtools/packages/oft-evm/",":@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/",":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":LayerZero-v2/=lib/LayerZero-v2/",":devtools/=lib/devtools/packages/toolbox-foundry/src/",":ds-test/=lib/LayerZero-v2/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":solidity-bytes-utils/=lib/solidity-bytes-utils/"]},"sources":{"test/external/morpho/adapters/MorphoVaultV1Adapter.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf54ddcfc8b07f6b018e80aefca8afa7243e3e36e96ae46e6ee2c55e4ad4ee598","license":"GPL-2.0-or-later","urls":["bzz-raw://a9b21d0eaf0f6fff556a32bd18d1a4f37bc31e13a567b9dd8d5b02fc300ad496","dweb:/ipfs/QmT1jD4XAzDkvrXQ2m9fd7V3edLCgBn8N98vCHBFafADfK"]},"test/external/morpho/adapters/interfaces/IMorphoVaultV1Adapter.sol":{"keccak256":"0x19c63e36525b59fe613da84381f82d81c6d9c7e20cc7bcc7f16ced7340c2f5ad","license":"GPL-2.0-or-later","urls":["bzz-raw://a31f1870f58a4e82ce9f16ba3535c7388acc8f8edb974c238fbb8d2fb11f8740","dweb:/ipfs/QmcRkyr6BdbLTeADKxVjPGeTJCaTzqBRZx7L5hVrh3KWqv"]},"test/external/morpho/interfaces/ allocate(bytes,uint256,bytes4,address).details: Does not log anything because the ids (logged in the parent vault) are enough.Returns the ids of the allocation and the change in allocation.

deallocate(bytes,uint256,bytes4,address).details: Does not log anything because the ids (logged in the parent vault) are enough.Returns the ids of the deallocation and the change in allocation.

realAssets().details: Returns the current value of the investments of the adapter (in underlying asset).

skim(address).details: Skims the adapter's balance of `token` and sends it to `skimRecipient`.This is useful to handle rewards that the adapter has earned.
